title: Nick Cocavessis
compiled_truth: Nick Cocavessis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-21 to 2001-06-01), Nick Cocavessis sent 8 and received 135 emails, totalling 143 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (8), [Ken Loch](people/ken-loch) (3), [Rusty Belflower](people/rusty-belflower) (2), [Audrey O'Neil](people/audrey-o-neil) (2), [Eromero](people/eromero-hou) (2).
